User.title: User
User.description: A user of the Kudos Connect platform.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

username.description: The display name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile picture.

college.description: The college or department the user belongs to.

Kudos.title: Kudos
Kudos.description: A message of appreciation sent from one user to another.

id.description: The unique identifier for the kudos.

receiverCollege.description: The college of the receiver at the time.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the kudos was sent.

isVisible.description: Whether the kudos is visible in the public feed.
